template.name: form.vue
template.content:
<!--
 * Copyright (c) 2013-Now https://jeesite.com All rights reserved.
 * No deletion without permission, or be held responsible to law.
 * @author ThinkGem
-->
<script setup lang="ts">
import { onLoad } from '@dcloudio/uni-app'
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { useI18n } from 'vue-i18n'
<%
var userselectExists = false;
var officeselectExists = false;
var companyselectExists = false;
var areaselectExists = false;
for(c in table.columnList){
  if(c.isEdit == '1' && c.showType != 'hidden'){
    if(c.showType == 'userselect'){
      userselectExists = true;
    }else if(c.showType == 'officeselect'){
      officeselectExists = true;
    }else if(c.showType == 'companyselect'){
      companyselectExists = true;
    }else if(c.showType == 'areaselect'){
      areaselectExists = true;
    }
  }
}
if(userselectExists || officeselectExists){ %>
import { officeTreeData } from '@/api/sys/office'
<% } %>
<% if(companyselectExists){ %>
import { companyTreeData } from '@/api/sys/company'
<% } %>
<% if(areaselectExists){ %>
import { areaTreeData } from '@/api/sys/area'
<% } %>
import { ${className}Form, ${className}Save } from '@/api${modulePath}${subModulePath}/${funName}'

defineOptions({
  name: '${ClassName}Form',
})

const { t } = useI18n()

definePage({
  style: {
    navigationBarTitleText: '${functionName}',
  },
  excludeLoginPath: true,
})

// 表单引用
const formRef = ref<any>()

// 表单数据
const model = ref({
  id: '',
<%
for (c in table.columnList){
  if (c.isEdit == '1' && c.showType != 'hidden'){
  // 如果是树结构的字段，则自动忽略
  if(table.isTreeEntity && @StringUtils.inString(c.columnName, 'parent_code',
    'parent_codes', 'tree_sorts', 'tree_leaf', 'tree_level', 'tree_names')
    && c.attrName != table.treeViewCodeAttrName
    && c.attrName != table.treeViewNameAttrName){
    continue;
  }
%>
<% if(c.showType == 'userselect' && c.attrType != 'String'){ %>
  ${c.simpleAttrName}: {
    userCode: '',
    userName: '',
  },
<% }else if(c.showType == 'officeselect' && c.attrType != 'String'){ %>
  ${c.simpleAttrName}: {
    officeCode: '',
    officeName: '',
  },
<% }else if(c.showType == 'companyselect' && c.attrType != 'String'){ %>
  ${c.simpleAttrName}: {
    companyCode: '',
    companyName: '',
  },
<% }else if(c.showType == 'areaselect' && c.attrType != 'String'){ %>
  ${c.simpleAttrName}: {
    areaCode: '',
    areaName: '',
  },
<% }else{ %>
  ${c.attrName}: '',
  <% if (!isBlank(c.attrName2)){ %>
  ${c.attrName2}: '',
  <% } %>
<% } %>
<%
  }
}
%>
  dataMap: {},
  isNewRecord: false,
  __t: 0,
})

// 表单规则
const schema = {
  validate(model: any) {
    const errors = []
<%
for (c in table.columnList){
  if (c.isEdit == '1' && c.showType != 'hidden'){
  // 如果是树结构的字段，则自动忽略
  if(table.isTreeEntity && @StringUtils.inString(c.columnName, 'parent_code',
      'parent_codes', 'tree_sorts', 'tree_leaf', 'tree_level', 'tree_names')
      && c.attrName != table.treeViewCodeAttrName
      && c.attrName != table.treeViewNameAttrName){
    continue;
  }
%>
  <% if(c.isRequired == '1'){ %>
    if (!model.${c.simpleAttrName}) {
      errors.push({ path: ['${c.simpleAttrName}'], message: '请输入${c.columnLabel}' })
    }
  <% } %>
<%
  }
}
%>
    return errors
  },
  isRequired(path: string) {
  <%
    var requiredFields = '';
    for(c in table.columnList){
      if(c.isEdit == '1' && c.showType != 'hidden' && c.isRequired == '1'){
        if(!(table.isTreeEntity && @StringUtils.inString(c.columnName, 'parent_code',
            'parent_codes', 'tree_sorts', 'tree_leaf', 'tree_level', 'tree_names')
            && c.attrName != table.treeViewCodeAttrName
            && c.attrName != table.treeViewNameAttrName)){
          if (isNotBlank(requiredFields)) {
            requiredFields = requiredFields + " || path === '" + c.simpleAttrName + "'";
          } else {
            requiredFields = "path === '" + c.simpleAttrName + "'";
          }
        }
      }
    }
  %>
    return ${isNotBlank(requiredFields) ? requiredFields : 'false'}
  },
}

<%
for (c in table.columnList){
  if (c.isEdit == '1' && c.showType != 'hidden'){
  // 如果是树结构的字段，则自动忽略
  if(table.isTreeEntity && @StringUtils.inString(c.columnName, 'parent_code',
    'parent_codes', 'tree_sorts', 'tree_leaf', 'tree_level', 'tree_names')
    && c.attrName != table.treeViewCodeAttrName
    && c.attrName != table.treeViewNameAttrName){
    continue;
  }
%>
<% if(c.showType == 'userselect' || c.showType == 'officeselect' || c.showType == 'companyselect' || c.showType == 'areaselect'){ %>
// ${c.columnLabel}选择列表
const ${c.simpleAttrName}List = ref<any[]>([])
<% } %>
<%
  }
}
%>

// 加载表单数据
onLoad(async (params: any) => {
  const res = await ${className}Form(params)
  Object.assign(model.value, res.${className})
  model.value.__t = new Date().getTime()

<%
for (c in table.columnList){
  if (c.isEdit == '1' && c.showType != 'hidden'){
  // 如果是树结构的字段，则自动忽略
  if(table.isTreeEntity && @StringUtils.inString(c.columnName, 'parent_code',
    'parent_codes', 'tree_sorts', 'tree_leaf', 'tree_level', 'tree_names')
    && c.attrName != table.treeViewCodeAttrName
    && c.attrName != table.treeViewNameAttrName){
    continue;
  }
%>
<% if(c.showType == 'userselect'){ %>
  // 加载人员和机构数据
  ${c.simpleAttrName}List.value = await officeTreeData({ isLoadUser: true })
<% }else if(c.showType == 'officeselect'){ %>
  // 加载机构数据
  ${c.simpleAttrName}List.value = await officeTreeData()
<% }else if(c.showType == 'companyselect'){ %>
  // 加载公司数据
  ${c.simpleAttrName}List.value = await companyTreeData()
<% }else if(c.showType == 'areaselect'){ %>
  // 加载区域数据
  ${c.simpleAttrName}List.value = await areaTreeData()
<% } %>
<%
  }
}
%>
})

/**
 * 提交表单数据
 */
async function handleSubmit() {
  const { valid } = await formRef.value.validate()
  if (!valid) {
    uni.showToast({ title: '您填写的信息有误，请根据提示修正。', icon: 'none' })
    return
  }
  try {
    const params = {
      isNewRecord: model.value.isNewRecord,
      id: model.value.id,
    }
    const res = await ${className}Save(params, model.value)
    uni.showModal({
      title: '提示',
      content: res.message,
      showCancel: false,
      success: () => {
      if (res.result === 'true') {
        uni.setStorageSync('refreshList', true)
        uni.navigateBack()
      }
      },
    })
  }
  catch (error) {
    console.error('保存失败: ', error)
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <view class="form-page">
    <wd-form ref="formRef" :model="model" :schema="schema" :hide-cancel="true">
    <%
    for (c in table.columnList){
      if (c.isEdit == '1' && c.showType != 'hidden'){
      // 如果是树结构的字段，则自动忽略
      if(table.isTreeEntity && @StringUtils.inString(c.columnName, 'parent_code',
        'parent_codes', 'tree_sorts', 'tree_leaf', 'tree_level', 'tree_names')
        && c.attrName != table.treeViewCodeAttrName
        && c.attrName != table.treeViewNameAttrName){
        continue;
      }
    %>
    <% if(c.showType == 'input'){ %>
      <wd-form-item prop="${c.simpleAttrName}" title="${c.columnLabel}">
      <wd-input
        v-model="model.${c.attrName}"
        <% if(c.dataLength != '0'){ %>:maxlength="${c.dataLength}"<% } %>
        placeholder="请输入${c.columnLabel}"
        <% if(c.isRequired == '1'){ %>required<% } %>
      />
      </wd-form-item>
    <% }else if(c.showType == 'textarea'){ %>
      <wd-form-item prop="${c.simpleAttrName}" title="${c.columnLabel}">
      <wd-textarea
        v-model="model.${c.attrName}"
        <% if(c.dataLength != '0'){ %>:maxlength="${c.dataLength}"<% } %>
        placeholder="请输入${c.columnLabel}"
        :auto-height="true"
        rows="3"
        <% if(c.isRequired == '1'){ %>required<% } %>
      />
      </wd-form-item>
    <% }else if(c.showType == 'select' || c.showType == 'select_multiple'){
      var isMultiple = (c.showType == 'select_multiple'); %>
      <wd-form-item prop="${c.simpleAttrName}" title="${c.columnLabel}">
      <js-select
        v-model="model.${c.attrName}"
        dict-type="${c.optionMap['dictType']}"
        placeholder="请选择${c.columnLabel}"
        :multiple="${isMultiple}"
        <% if(c.isRequired == '1'){ %>required<% } %>
      />
      </wd-form-item>
    <% }else if(c.showType == 'radio'){ %>
      <wd-form-item prop="${c.simpleAttrName}" title="${c.columnLabel}">
      <js-radio
        v-model="model.${c.attrName}"
        dict-type="${c.optionMap['dictType']}"
        <% if(c.isRequired == '1'){ %>required<% } %>
      />
      </wd-form-item>
    <% }else if(c.showType == 'checkbox'){ %>
      <wd-form-item prop="${c.simpleAttrName}" title="${c.columnLabel}">
      <js-checkbox
        v-model="model.${c.attrName}"
        dict-type="${c.optionMap['dictType']}"
        <% if(c.isRequired == '1'){ %>required<% } %>
      />
      </wd-form-item>
    <% }else if(c.showType == 'date' || c.showType == 'datetime'){
      var isTime = (c.showType == 'datetime'); %>
      <wd-form-item prop="${c.simpleAttrName}" title="${c.columnLabel}">
      <js-datetime
        v-model="model.${c.attrName}"
        placeholder="请选择${c.columnLabel}"
        type="${isTime ? 'datetime' : 'date'}"
        <% if(c.isRequired == '1'){ %>required<% } %>
      />
      </wd-form-item>
    <% }else if(c.showType == 'userselect'){ %>
      <wd-form-item prop="${c.simpleAttrName}.userCode" title="${c.columnLabel}">
      <js-tree-select
        v-model="model.${c.simpleAttrName}.userCode"
        v-model:label-value="model.${c.simpleAttrName}.userName"
        :tree-data="${c.simpleAttrName}List"
        placeholder="请选择${c.columnLabel}"
        <% if(c.isRequired == '1'){ %>required<% } %>
      />
      </wd-form-item>
    <% }else if(c.showType == 'officeselect'){ %>
      <wd-form-item prop="${c.simpleAttrName}.officeCode" title="${c.columnLabel}">
      <js-tree-select
        v-model="model.${c.simpleAttrName}.officeCode"
        v-model:label-value="model.${c.simpleAttrName}.officeName"
        :tree-data="${c.simpleAttrName}List"
        placeholder="请选择${c.columnLabel}"
        <% if(c.isRequired == '1'){ %>required<% } %>
      />
      </wd-form-item>
    <% }else if(c.showType == 'companyselect'){ %>
      <wd-form-item prop="${c.simpleAttrName}.companyCode" title="${c.columnLabel}">
      <js-tree-select
        v-model="model.${c.simpleAttrName}.companyCode"
        v-model:label-value="model.${c.simpleAttrName}.companyName"
        :tree-data="${c.simpleAttrName}List"
        placeholder="请选择${c.columnLabel}"
        <% if(c.isRequired == '1'){ %>required<% } %>
      />
      </wd-form-item>
    <% }else if(c.showType == 'areaselect'){ %>
      <wd-form-item prop="${c.simpleAttrName}.areaCode" title="${c.columnLabel}">
      <js-tree-select
        v-model="model.${c.simpleAttrName}.areaCode"
        v-model:label-value="model.${c.simpleAttrName}.areaName"
        :tree-data="${c.simpleAttrName}List"
        placeholder="请选择${c.columnLabel}"
        <% if(c.isRequired == '1'){ %>required<% } %>
      />
      </wd-form-item>
    <% }else{ %>
      <wd-form-item prop="${c.simpleAttrName}" title="${c.columnLabel}">
      <wd-input
        v-model="model.${c.attrName}"
        <% if(c.dataLength != '0'){ %>:maxlength="${c.dataLength}"<% } %>
        placeholder="请输入${c.columnLabel}"
        <% if(c.isRequired == '1'){ %>required<% } %>
      />
      </wd-form-item>
    <% } %>
    <%
      }
    }
    %>
    <% if(toBoolean(table.optionMap['isImageUpload'])){ %>
      <wd-form-item prop="dataMap" title="上传图片">
      <js-upload v-model="model.dataMap" :biz-key="model.id" biz-type="${className}_image" upload-type="image" :load-time="model.__t" />
      </wd-form-item>
    <% } %>
    <% if(toBoolean(table.optionMap['isFileUpload'])){ %>
      <wd-form-item prop="dataMap" title="上传文件">
      <js-upload v-model="model.dataMap" :biz-key="model.id" biz-type="${className}_file" upload-type="all" :load-time="model.__t" />
      </wd-form-item>
    <% } %>
    </wd-form>
    <view class="form-footer">
      <view class="button">
        <wd-button block type="primary" @click="handleSubmit">
          {{ t('common.save') }}
        </wd-button>
      </view>
    </view>
  </view>
</template>

<style lang="scss" scoped>

</style>
<% %>
